news.t: Capture Exposure to the Top AI Adopters With These ETFs

holdings.infoBox: RSPG is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings. The top holdings are SLB N.V. stock at 5.79%, Marathon Petroleum at 5.46%, Targa Resources at 5.18%, APA Corporation at 5.18%, and Diamondback Energy at 4.98%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight Energy ETF (RSPG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Equal Weight Energy Plus index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US energy companies in the S&P 500. RSPG was launched on Nov 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P 500 Equal Weight Energy Plus Index

data.title: Capture Exposure to the Top AI Adopters With These ETFs
data.text: At this point, advisors and investors are well aware that most, if not all, companies within the S&P 500 are fervently working to incorporate artificial intelligence into their workflows.

data.title: 8 Best Energy ETFs to Buy
data.text: Energy ETFs have struggled over the past year as oil prices churned, but the tide could be turning. These funds give investors lower-risk exposure to the space.

data.title: Final Trades: Invesco's Equal Weight Energy ETF, Cardinal Health and Shake Shack
data.text: Today's “Halftime Report” Investment Committee, Bryn Talkington, Josh Brown and Jason Snipe, give their top picks to watch for the second half.
